data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for separate profiles per family member.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Separate profiles per family member', but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or API reads that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case describes a family account structure, there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate the existence of separate profiles for each family member. Therefore, the validation cannot be conclusively determined.
gaps: No evidence demonstrating separate profiles for each family member.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of separate profiles for each family member.
